---
title: About
---


## What I do

::::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
![](/img/me/me-studio.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="66%"}
- Lecturer, UBC Statistics, MDS-Vancouver
:::
:::::


## What I've done

::::: columns
::: {.column width="33%"}
![](/img/me/me-myanmar.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="66%"}
- Macaulay Honors College CUNY Hunter College
    - Psychology + Neuroscience: Learning and memory
- Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health
    - Epidemiology: Spread of ideas in social networks
- Virginia Tech
    - Data science education in biomedical sciences

- The Carpentries, 2014
:::
:::::

## What I enjoy

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Daniel Chen](/img/me/dan-run.jpg){style="float: right; height: 200px;"}
![Daniel Chen](/img/me/dan-dive.jpg){style="float: right; height: 300px;"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](/img/me/dan-tour.jpeg){style="float: left; height: 500px;"}
:::

:::::
